title: Find a Value of a Mysterious Function Closest to Target
titleCn: 找到最接近目标值的函数值

testcases.input: arr = [9,12,3,7,15], target = 5 Output: 2 Explanation: Calling func with all the pairs of [l,r] = [[0,0],[1,1],[2,2],[3,3],[4,4],[0,1],[1,2],[2,3],[3,4],[0,2],[1,3],[2,4],[0,3],[1,4],[0,4]], Winston got the following results [9,12,3,7,15,8,0,3,7,0,0,3,0,0,0]. The value closest to 5 is 7 and 3, thus the minimum difference is 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Calling func with all the pairs of [l,r] = [[0,0],[1,1],[2,2],[3,3],[4,4],[0,1],[1,2],[2,3],[3,4],[0,2],[1,3],[2,4],[0,3],[1,4],[0,4]], Winston got the following results [9,12,3,7,15,8,0,3,7,0,0,3,0,0,0]. The value closest to 5 is 7 and 3, thus the minimum difference is 2.

testcases.input: arr = [1000000,1000000,1000000], target = 1 Output: 999999 Explanation: Winston called the func with all possible values of [l,r] and he always got 1000000, thus the min difference is 999999.
testcases.expectedOutput: 999999 Explanation: Winston called the func with all possible values of [l,r] and he always got 1000000, thus the min difference is 999999.
